ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of findings in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, reviewed, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES radiologists ("radiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "finding_name" TEXT /* Name of the finding (e.g., Atelectasis, Edema) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the finding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finding_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated finding */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Level of severity (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated finding */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated severity level */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., size, volume) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiologists" (
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiologist */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the radiologist */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the radiologist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the radiologist */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the radiologist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_types" (
  "imaging_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the imaging type (e.g., X-Ray, CT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the imaging type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("imaging_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "imaging_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each imaging session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient undergoing imaging */,
  "imaging_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of imaging performed */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the imaging session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for the imaging session */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the imaging session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the imaging session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_imaging_sessions_imaging_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_type_id") REFERENCES imaging_types ("imaging_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_findings" (
  "report_finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report-finding association */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the finding recorded in the report */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_findings_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES finding_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_findings_finding_id FOREIGN KEY ("finding_id") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_findings_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., radiologist, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Status indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "changed_data" TEXT /* Data changed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_workflow" (
  "workflow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report workflow entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist involved in the workflow */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., in_progress, completed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the workflow action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workflow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_workflow_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_workflow_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES radiologists ("radiologist_id")
)
